description: Chocolate cake is a baked dessert made with cocoa powder, melted chocolate, or both. It ranges from simple everyday sponge cakes to layered celebration cakes with frosting or ganache.
preparation_steps: Prepare a batter by combining dry ingredients and wet ingredients.
Bake the cake layers or single cake until set.
Cool completely before adding frosting, glaze, or ganache.

health_advice.benefits: Provides enjoyment and can be suitable as an occasional treat.
health_advice.risks: Often high in sugar and calories, especially when frosted.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Keep portions moderate and consider less-sweet frosting or smaller slices.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional versions are usually vegetarian. Vegan and gluten-free versions are widely possible with recipe changes.
